name: CTA approved right-side images
semantics: The three approved CTA right-side images, each locked to a specific CTA section background color. Not interchangeable; one image per background.

name: IBS-C symptom icon trio
semantics: Fixed ordered trio (Constipation, Belly Pain, Bloating, left-to-right), circular green-tinted icons with navy labels. All three must appear together; no reordering or substitution.
